children.name: This sector provides training for vehicle operation, maintenance, and servicing within land transport. It builds technical and practical skills to support safe and efficient transport services.
children.characters: This sector provides training for vehicle operation, maintenance, and servicing within land transport. It builds technical and practical skills to support safe and efficient transport services.

children.name: This sector trains individuals in building, repair, and maintenance work for residential, commercial, and public structures. It equips learners with practical skills needed in the growing construction and infrastructure industry.
children.characters: This sector trains individuals in building, repair, and maintenance work for residential, commercial, and public structures. It equips learners with practical skills needed in the growing construction and infrastructure industry.

children.name: This sector develops competencies in installing, maintaining, and repairing electrical and electronic systems. It ensures learners can safely work with wiring, devices, and digital equipment used in homes, businesses, and industries.
children.characters: This sector develops competencies in installing, maintaining, and repairing electrical and electronic systems. It ensures learners can safely work with wiring, devices, and digital equipment used in homes, businesses, and industries.

children.name: HEATING, VENTILATING, AIR- CONDITIONING AND REFRIGERATION TECHNOLOGY SECTOR
children.characters: HEATING, VENTILATING, AIR- CONDITIONING AND REFRIGERATION TECHNOLOGY SECTOR

children.name: This sector builds skills in installing, troubleshooting, and maintaining air-conditioning and refrigeration systems.
children.characters: This sector builds skills in installing, troubleshooting, and maintaining air-conditioning and refrigeration systems.

children.name: This sector focuses on digital design, technical support, and information technology-related competencies. It trains learners to work effectively in tech-driven environments requiring creativity and problem-solving.
children.characters: This sector focuses on digital design, technical support, and information technology-related competencies. It trains learners to work effectively in tech-driven environments requiring creativity and problem-solving.

children.name: SOCIAL AND OTHER COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT SERVICES SECTOR
children.characters: SOCIAL AND OTHER COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT SERVICES SECTOR

children.name: This sector focuses on household management, personal care, and community support roles.
children.characters: This sector focuses on household management, personal care, and community support roles.

children.name: This sector covers event planning, tour operations, and guest-related services in tourism establishments. It trains learners to support tourism activities with organization, creativity, and excellent customer service.
children.characters: This sector covers event planning, tour operations, and guest-related services in tourism establishments. It trains learners to support tourism activities with organization, creativity, and excellent customer service.

children.name: This sector develops skills for hotel, restaurant, and hospitality operations. It prepares learners to deliver quality services in food, beverage, and accommodation settings.
children.characters: This sector develops skills for hotel, restaurant, and hospitality operations. It prepares learners to deliver quality services in food, beverage, and accommodation settings.

children.characters:

children.name: This sector focuses on developing skills for providing care, wellness, and community support services.
